summary: Decent audience recording with a standout Sugaree but below typical Moore AUD quality
review: The fan notes that this is an audience (AUD) source that sounds okay yet falls short of the usual Moore‑patched recordings, recommending the Glassberg version for better fidelity. Musically, the performance of "Sugaree" is highlighted as a must‑hear moment.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one moderate (3‑star) review; the show gets modest praise for Sugaree while the recording is judged below standard Moore AUD quality, yielding an average rating around 3.1.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Decent but noticeably lower fidelity than a standard Moore‑patched audience tape; lacks crispness and clarity.
